titleStmt.title: SII 23.223: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 223. (A.R. No. 223 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Parāntaka I: date lost

summary.p: This is also an inscription of Parāntaka I, with its pieces disjointed and damaged. It seems to register gifts of lands made by some persons to the temple, including a plot of 9 mā granted by a lady who is called a Talaikkōli (a title of distinction in music). Mention is made of a daughter of one Taḷichchēri Dēvanār, but it is not clear whether these two names refer to one and the same person.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. matiraikoṇṭa koppara
til taḷicceri tevanār makaḷ

māvaraikkuk kiḻellai ciṟukuṭāṉ Amutaṉ A catirakkāṟceykku meṟkkum teṉnellai vakkama
ṉ cattiyum Ivviruvar nilattukku vaṭakkum melellaiy Ānāṟṟu vāyk kālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellaiy
tterkkum Iṉṉālellaikkum Uḷḷiṭṭa Iṉṉāṉmāvaraiyum It talaikkoliyār
Ittevarkku kuṭutta nānmāvaraikkuk kiḻellai Ittalaikkoli yāre devarkku vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta Eṭṭumāc ceykkume
ke Ittalaikkoliyār muṉ kuṭutta nāṉmāvaraikkum vaṭakku melellai vaṭakku nokki Ōṭina vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa vellai
kkut teṟkum Āka Inṉānkellaiyi lakappaṭṭa nāṉmāvaraiyum muṉ cuṭṭiṉa nāṉmāvaraiyum Āka Ivvirucārum vanta Oṉpatu māvum Ittalaikkoliyāre

laiyavarākam parāntakaṉ ṟukkum teṉnilaic kiṟukuṭāṉ Amutan Amaratiran nilattukku vaṭakkum Itte—(nilam ciṟukuṭivicaiya)—
kuṭutta Oṉpatumācce kkālukkut teṟkum Innāṉkellaiy Akappaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭumāvum Allatu vaṭṭakkālukkuk kiḻe—( nattu mahādevarkku pa)—
l viḷākattu munṟumā vaṭakkum melellaiy munnāḷ koṇṭu devarkkuk kuṭutta nāṉmāvaraikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellaiy malaiya— (kuṭutteṉ nakkan)—
cceykkut terkku Āna kāṟ ceyyum vaṇṇaṅkuṭi vilaikoṇṭa Eḻumāvukku Ellaiy kiḻellaiy kā tiya Araikkālukku mer kkum �—kkaiyttiṭṭu Iṭṭu—
Uṭciṟuvāykkā ḻakkum vaṭavellai kāvina māvukkut teṟkum Innālellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa Eḻumāvaraiya—(ṭa kāliyār kuṭutta nila)—
merkkum teṉnellaiy pākkaran Āḷkinṟa kāṟceykku vaṭak kum melellai Araicūruṭaiyāṉ kāṟceykkuk—(mānom Ivviru veli ni)—
Araikkālum Āka Immu nāṉmāvaraicceyum ciṟukuṭi vicaiya nalluḻānāna māṟanātaniṭai—(vum Itaṟṟiṟampil tiru)—
raiyum cella tirukkāṟkuṭi ḻallaiy varākam parāṉtakan kalattil kkiṉṟa nilattukku meṟkkun �—(kaṇṭanen Ivaṉ)—
Digital edition of SII 23.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
